actions.name: Dagger
desc: mw 4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage.

actions.name: Sling
desc: rw 4 to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Dagger
desc: mw 4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage.

actions.name: Sling
desc: rw 4 to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Dagger
desc: mw 5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) piercing damage.

actions.name: Dropped Rock
desc: rw 5 to hit, one target directly below the kobold. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Multiattack
desc: The owlbear makes two attacks: one with its beak and one with its claws.

actions.name: Beak
desc: mw 7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 10 (1d10 + 5) piercing damage.

actions.name: Claws
desc: mw 7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) slashing damage.

actions.name: Multiattack
desc: The snake makes two attacks: one with its bite and one with its tail.

actions.name: Bite
desc: mw 3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 3 (1d4 + 1) piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) fire damage.

actions.name: Tail
desc: mw 3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 3 (1d4 + 1) bludgeoning damage plus 3 (1d6) fire damage.

actions.name: Bite
desc: mw 4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) fire damage.

actions.name: Scalding Breath {@recharge}
desc: The fume drake exhales a 15-foot cone of scalding steam. Each creature in that area must make a 11 Dexterity saving throw, taking 4 (1d8) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

actions.name: Fist
desc: mw 2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (2d4) bludgeoning damage plus 5 (2d4) poison damage.

actions.name: Pacifying Spores (3/Day)
desc: The myconid ejects spores at one creature it can see within 5 feet of it. The target must succeed on a 11 Constitution saving throw or be stunned for 1 minute. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

actions.name: Rapport Spores
desc: A 20-foot radius of spores extends from the myconid. These spores can go around corners and affect only creatures with an Intelligence of 2 or higher that aren't undead, constructs, or elementals. Affected creatures can communicate telepathically with one another while they are within 30 feet of each other. The effect lasts for 1 hour.

actions.name: Fist
desc: mw 1 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 (1d4 - 1) bludgeoning damage plus 2 (1d4) poison damage.

actions.name: Rapport Spores (3/Day)
desc: A 10-foot radius of spores extends from the myconid. These spores can go around corners and affect only creatures with an Intelligence of 2 or higher that aren't undead, constructs, or elementals. Affected creatures can communicate telepathically with one another while they are within 30 feet of each other. The effect lasts for 1 hour.

actions.name: Slam
desc: mw 3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d6 + 1) bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Bite
desc: mw 2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 9 (2d6 + 2) piercing damage.

actions.name: Claws
desc: mw 4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (2d4 + 2) slashing damage. If the target is a creature other than an elf or undead, it must succeed on a 10 Constitution saving throw or be paralyzed for 1 minute. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

actions.name: Multiattack
desc: The harpy makes two attacks: one with its claws and one with its club.

actions.name: Claws
desc: mw 3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (2d4 + 1) slashing damage.

actions.name: Club
desc: mw 3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 3 (1d4 + 1) bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Luring Song
desc: The harpy sings a magical melody. Every humanoid and giant within 300 feet of the harpy that can hear the song must succeed on a 11 Wisdom saving throw or be charmed until the song ends. The harpy must take a bonus action on its subsequent turns to continue singing. It can stop singing at any time. The song ends if the harpy is incapacitated. While charmed by the harpy, a target is incapacitated and ignores the songs of other harpies. If the charmed target is more than 5 feet away from the harpy, the target must move on its turn toward the harpy by the most direct route. It doesn't avoid opportunity attacks, but before moving into damaging terrain, such as lava or a pit, and whenever it takes damage from a source other than the harpy, a target can repeat the saving throw. A creature can also repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns. If a creature's saving throw is successful, the effect ends on it. A target that successfully saves is immune to this harpy's song for the next 24 hours.

actions.name: Tentacles
desc: mw 4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 bludgeoning damage, and the target is grappled (escape 10). Until this grapple ends, the octopus can't use its tentacles on another target.

actions.name: Ink Cloud (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest)
desc: A 5-foot-radius cloud of ink extends all around the octopus if it is underwater. The area is heavily obscured for 1 minute, although a significant current can disperse the ink. After releasing the ink, the octopus can use the Dash action as a bonus action.

actions.name: Bite
desc: mw 5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d10 + 3) piercing damage.

actions.name: Breath Weapons {@recharge 5}
desc: The dragon uses one of the following breath weapons. The dragon exhales lightning in a 40-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in that line must make a 12 Dexterity saving throw, taking 16 (3d10) lightning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. The dragon exhales repulsion energy in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in that area must succeed on a 12 Strength saving throw. On a failed save, the creature is pushed 30 feet away from the dragon.

actions.name: Bite
desc: mw 5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d10 + 3) piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) lightning damage.

actions.name: Lightning Breath {@recharge 5}
desc: The dragon exhales lightning in a 30-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in that line must make a 12 Dexterity saving throw, taking 22 (4d10) lightning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
